patch.summary: Update name or avatar chat room

post.summary: Get or create a direct (1-on-1) chat
Request join chat room for user not exits in chat room
Add multiple members to a chat room

delete.summary: Remove a member from a chat room (Admin only)

post.summary: Send a message to a chat room

get.summary: Get message history for a chat room
Get For You Feed (ranked by engagement)

post.summary: Save a post to a list

get.summary: Get saved posts in a list
Get reaction breakdown for a post

members.description: List of member IDs to add initially

post_id.description: ID of the post to comment on

reaction.description: Reaction type (like, love, haha, wow, sad, angry)
